basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhubaneswar (AIIMS Bhubaneswar)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhubaneswar (AIIMS Bhubaneswar) Project Technical Support - II Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 Project Technical Support - II vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support - II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation admissible in respect of SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support - II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support - II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support - II Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support - II Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support - II Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support - II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support - II Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 27th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Support - II post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have completed 12th in Science with a Diploma (MLT/ DMLT / Engineering or equivalent) and five years of relevant experience, or a three-year Graduate degree in a relevant field with two years of experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support - II position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 20000 per month, plus HRA as admissible.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support - II posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are advised to be prepared for the interview.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support - II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support - II post at AIIMS Bhubaneswar.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhubaneswar (AIIMS Bhubaneswar), Odisha.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.
